message:
feat(demo_showcase): implement split-view docs navigation (bd-i0i9)

Enhanced DocsPage with split-view layout:
- Left pane: document list with selection and navigation
- Right pane: rendered markdown content with scrollable viewport

Features:
- Tab/Arrow keys to switch focus between panes
- j/k navigation in list mode, vim-style scrolling in content mode
- Per-document scroll position preservation
- Theme-aware rendering with highlighted borders on focused pane
- Enter to focus content, Escape to return to list

Closes bd-i0i9

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
